Off Calendar Jun-30-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Mary Sancimino for Lotte Shustak.

The Court stated that there were no oppositions, that everything seemed to be in order and that notice was proper. The Court granted the petition and will sign the order after further review.

Judge Pro Temp: Sue M. Kaplan. Reporter: Peggy Tsujimoto CSR#5229. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris and M. Anderson.

Petition For Authority To Compromise Suit And For Authority To Implement Terms Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jul-11-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Mary Sancimino and Patricia Rosenberg appearing for and with Lotte Shustak. Robin Gross, counsel for Regina Giesler is also in court. Counsel has filed the 4th and final inventory and appraisal increasing the value. Ms. Rosenberg reports to the court that Mr. Skootsky is satified with the valuation and he is not in court today. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Ex Parte Petition For Authority To Pay Additional Attorney'S Fees And Costs
Off Calendar Jun-28-2006 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Authority To Compromise Suit And For Authority To Implement Terms Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jun-28-2006 Continued To Jul-11-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mary Sancimino and Patricia Rosenberg appearing for Lotte Lundell Shustak. Seth Skootsky appearing for brother/creditor. Robin Gross, counsel for plaintiff Regina Giesler is also in court. Ms. Sancimino gives the court a copy of an Inventory and Appraisal of the Prairie Creek property. Mr. Skootsky is objecting to Nalla Corporation's valuation. He will be filing objection to the probate referee's appraisal. The Court wants counsel to try to reslove the issue informally. Matter is continued to 7/11.
On Ms. Rosenberg's ex parte petition for fees, she apologizes for having a wrong amount. The examiner is corrected about the title amount. Ms. Rosenberg is asking for additional fees. Matter submitted. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

Petition For Authority To Compromise Suit And For Authority To Implement Terms Of Settlement Agreement
Off Calendar Jun-21-2006 Continued To Jun-28-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Mary Sancimino and Patricia Rosenberg appearing for petitioner. Ernest Der appearing for creditor Paul Shustak. Mr. Der requests for two weeks continuance to review the backup documents for appraisal. Ms. Rosenberg asks for a shorter continuance. She will give the backup documents to Mr. Der. Matter is continued to 6/28. On the exparte petition for additional attorney's fees, Ms. Rosenberg requests the court to review her timesheet and not to require it to be filed due to the litigation. Court agrees. Matter is continued to 6/28. Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
